description_long: This is a large, cylindrical metal barrel with a dark, almost black lid and a body painted in a deep reddish-brown color. The surface of the barrel is weathered, showing significant patches of rust and wear, especially around the upper and lower edges and along the sides, indicating prolonged outdoor exposure. The barrel's body features subtle horizontal ridges, typical of industrial steel drums, which add structural strength. The lid appears to be tightly fitted and is slightly reflective, contrasting with the matte, corroded finish of the body. There are no visible handles, spouts, or openings aside from the main lid, and no labels or markings are present. This type of barrel is commonly found in urban or industrial environments, used for storage or waste collection.
description: A large, weathered metal barrel with a dark lid and rusted reddish-brown body, featuring horizontal ridges and no visible handles or markings.
description_view_0: Front view shows the barrel's rust patterns most prominently, especially a large patch near the center and upper rim.
description_view_1: This side view highlights a vertical streak of rust and more pronounced wear along the upper edge.
description_view_2: This angle displays a relatively cleaner section with smaller rust patches and a smoother surface.
description_view_3: This view shows a broad area of rust near the upper rim and a vertical streak along the side.
